summary: Completed comprehensive testing of competency progression logic in the Student Driver Profile Generator. Verified hour-based level determination (C1: 0-11h, C2: 12-15h, C3: 16-20h, C4: 20h+), competency coverage coherence, and level-appropriate contexts/feedback. All major requirements working correctly.
passed_tests: Hour-to-level mapping: C1 (0-11h), C2 (12-15h), C3 (16-20h), C4 (20h+) working correctly across 8 test profiles
Students with 5-11h correctly placed in C1 with C2/C3/C4 showing 0 sub-competencies covered
Student with 12h correctly placed in C2 with C1 mostly mastered (9/9), C3/C4 showing 0 covered
Student with 18h correctly placed in C3 with appropriate competency coverage
Student with 35h correctly placed in C4 with appropriate competency coverage
Context appropriateness: C1 contexts include 'parking', 'quartier calme', 'campagne'
Context appropriateness: C3 contexts include 'nuit en agglomération' for difficult conditions
Context appropriateness: C4 contexts include 'itinéraire inconnu' for autonomous driving
Student feedback matches competency levels: C1 focuses on basic controls, C3 on complex maneuvers
Progression percentages reflect actual covered sub-competencies correctly
getCurrentCompetencyLevel() function determining levels based on hours correctly
generateStatus() function ensuring only current and previous level competencies are covered
getContextsForLevel() and getFeedbackForLevel() providing appropriate content per level
